mapper.update: /* prchMgmtMapper.insertCmsnPrchInfo */ INSERT INTO CLS_CMSN_PRCH_INFO ( PRCH_YM , ORGN_ID , CMSN_AMT , CMSN_VAT , PRCH_STAT_CD , TAXBILL_ISSU_YN , CMSN_PRVD_YN , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT A.PRCH_YM , A.ORGN_ID , SUM(NVL(A.CMSN_AMT, 0)) AS CMSN_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.CMSN_VAT, 0)) AS CMSN_VAT , '10' /* 등록 */ , 'N' , 'N' , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE FROM CLS_CMSN_PRCH_DTL A WHERE A.PRCH_YM = #{PRCH_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.PRCH_YM, A.ORGN_ID
mapper.insert: /* prchMgmtMapper.insertInstBondPrchDtlBatch */ INSERT INTO CLS_INST_BOND_PRCH_DTL ( PRCH_YM , ORGN_ID , PRCH_SRL_NUM , INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD , INST_AMT , INST_VAT , SPT_AMT , SPT_VAT , AGNCY_AMT , AGNCY_VAT , PRCH_INST_AMT , PRCH_INST_VAT , SRVC_CNTR_NUM , OPEN_DT , TMNT_DT , PRDT_ID , PRDT_SRL_NUM , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{CLS_ACNT_YM} , A.OPEN_AGNT_CD , SQ_CLS_PRCH_01.NEXTVAL , '10' AS INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD , ROUND(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT / 1.1) AS INST_AMT , B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT - ROUND(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT / 1.1) AS INST_VAT , ROUND(G.SUBSD_AMT / 1.1) AS SUBSD_AMT , G.SUBSD_AMT - ROUND(G.SUBSD_AMT / 1.1) AS SUBSD_VAT , ROUND(G.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT / 1.1) AS AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT , G.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT - ROUND(G.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT / 1.1) AS AGNCY_SUBSD_VAT , ROUND(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT / 1.1) AS INST_AMT , B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT - ROUND(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT / 1.1) AS INST_VAT , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'C', SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , B.MODEL_ID , C.INTM_SRL_NO , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B , MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO C , LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST D , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO E , CMS_TRGT_INFO F , MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST G WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE LIKE #{CLS_ACNT_YM} || '%' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND 'Y' = ( CASE WHEN A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= '15' THEN 'Y' WHEN A.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT IS NOT NULL AND B.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM ) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM ) AND C.MODEL_ID = D.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND C.INTM_SRL_NO = D.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = E.CONTRACT_NUM AND E.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND E.EVNT_TRTM_DT = ( SELECT MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AND F.STDR_MON = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{CLS_ACNT_YM}, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AND F.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND F.SALE_PLCY_ID = G.SALE_PLCY_CD AND G.RATE_CD = E.SOC AND G.PRDT_ID = C.MODEL_ID AND G.OLD_YN = D.OLD_YN AND G.OPER_TYPE = DECODE(A.MNP_IND_CD, '1', 'MNP3', 'NAC3') AND G.AGRM_TRM = B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT AND G.ORGN_ID = A.OPEN_AGNT_CD

/* prchMgmtMapper.insertInstBondPrchInfo */ INSERT INTO CLS_INST_BOND_PRCH_INFO ( PRCH_YM , ORGN_ID , INST_CNT , INST_AMT , INST_VAT , INST_INT_AMT , INST_INT_VAT , SPT_AMT , SPT_VAT , AGNCY_AMT , AGNCY_VAT , PRCH_INST_AMT , PRCH_INST_VAT , PRCH_INST_INT_VAT , CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT , CASH_PRVD_AMT , PRCH_STAT_CD , PRVD_YN , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT A.PRCH_YM , A.ORGN_ID , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', 1, -1)) AS INST_CNT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.INST_AMT, A.INST_AMT * -1)) AS INST_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.INST_VAT, A.INST_VAT * -1)) AS INST_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.INST_INT_AMT, A.INST_INT_AMT * -1)) AS INST_INT_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.INST_INT_VAT, A.INST_INT_VAT * -1)) AS INST_INT_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.SPT_AMT, A.SPT_AMT * -1)) AS SPT_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.SPT_VAT, A.SPT_VAT * -1)) AS SPT_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.AGNCY_AMT, A.AGNCY_AMT * -1)) AS AGNCY_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.AGNCY_VAT, A.AGNCY_VAT * -1)) AS AGNCY_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.PRCH_INST_AMT, A.PRCH_INST_AMT * -1)) AS PRCH_INST_AMT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.PRCH_INST_VAT, A.PRCH_INST_VAT * -1)) AS PRCH_INST_VAT , SUM(DECODE(A.INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD, '10', A.PRCH_INST_INT_VAT, A.PRCH_INST_INT_VAT * -1)) AS PRCH_INST_INT_VAT , 0 AS CLS_ACTN_PROC_AMT , 0 AS CASH_PRVD_AMT , '10' AS PRCH_STAT_CD , 'N' AS CMSN_PRVD_YN , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE FROM CLS_INST_BOND_PRCH_DTL A WHERE A.PRCH_YM = #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.PRCH_YM, A.ORGN_ID

/* prchMgmtMapper.insertInstBondPrchDtlTmntBatch */ INSERT INTO CLS_INST_BOND_PRCH_DTL ( PRCH_YM , ORGN_ID , PRCH_SRL_NUM , INST_OCCR_SCTN_CD , INST_AMT , INST_VAT , INST_INT_AMT , INST_INT_VAT , SPT_AMT , SPT_VAT , AGNCY_AMT , AGNCY_VAT , PRCH_INST_AMT , PRCH_INST_VAT , PRCH_INST_INT_VAT , SRVC_CNTR_NUM , OPEN_DT , TMNT_DT , PRDT_ID , PRDT_SRL_NUM , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{CLS_ACNT_YM} AS PRCH_YM , A.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS ORGN_ID , SQ_CLS_PRCH_01.NEXTVAL , '20' AS INST_OCCR_SCNT_CD /* 해지 */ , B.INST_AMT /* 할부원금 */ , B.INST_VAT /* 할부원금부가세 */ , B.INST_INT_AMT /* 할부수수료 */ , B.INST_INT_VAT /* 할부수수료부가세 */ , B.SPT_AMT /* 공시지원금 */ , B.SPT_VAT /* 공시지원금부가세 */ , B.AGNCY_AMT /* 대리점보조금 */ , B.AGNCY_VAT /* 대리점보조금부가세 */ , B.PRCH_INST_AMT /* 매입할부원금 */ , B.PRCH_INST_VAT /* 매입할부원금부가세 */ , B.PRCH_INST_INT_VAT /* 매입할부수수료부가세 */ , B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM /* 계약번호 */ , B.OPEN_DT /* 개통일자 */ , SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) AS TMNT_DT /* 해지일자 */ , B.PRDT_ID /* 제품ID */ , B.PRDT_SRL_NUM /* 제품일련번호 */ , #{USER_ID} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID} , SYSDATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , CLS_INST_BOND_PRCH_DTL B WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{CLS_ACNT_YM}, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') || '%' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.SUB_STATUS_DATE LIKE #{CLS_ACNT_YM} || '%' /* 전월개통 당월해지 기간이 14일 이내인 경우 */ AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM
